rationale: The citing paper is an editorial/content-coding review of 401 JMR articles (2013–2019), and its stated prior-work links are to historical JMR reviews (e.g., Huber et al. 2014), not to this specific donation-default study. The matched evidence is only a single DOI reference with no contextual quotation, which is consistent with an article being included as an example or cataloged item in a broad journal survey rather than being substantively used. Based on the available evidence, this looks like an incidental mention.
